campaign_goal.description: Retention, conversion, onboarding, or winback objective.

contract.summary: Use this blueprint to plan, generate, check, send, and track lifecycle emails so customer outreach stays timely, governed, and tied to customer state.
users: Growth, lifecycle marketing, and customer success teams.

description: Use this blueprint to plan, generate, check, send, and track lifecycle emails so customer outreach stays timely, governed, and tied to customer state.

metadata.customizable_for: Retention campaigns, onboarding journeys, renewal nudges, education sequences.
metadata.description: Use this blueprint to plan, generate, check, send, and track lifecycle emails so customer outreach stays timely, governed, and tied to customer state.

human_control.reason: The workflow may surface notable findings for review but does not apply irreversible actions by itself.

fields.description: Run mode used for mock, test, or real-adapter execution.
fields.label: Run mode

fields.description: Input source adapter. Mock is safe for demos; real inputs use json, file, env_json, streams, or connector profiles.
fields.label: Input adapter

fields.description: Local run-store root for logs, events, inputs, outputs, and final artifacts.
fields.label: Run-store root

fields.description: Whether this blueprint disables human control, emits notice-only events, or requires approval for high-impact actions.
fields.label: Human control mode

fields.description: Whether the shared run-store dashboard should be available for this run.
fields.label: Web UI

fields.description: LLM endpoint used by LLM-backed agents.
fields.label: LLM API base

fields.description: LLM model used by LLM-backed agents.
fields.label: LLM model

input_contract.description: Use this blueprint to plan, generate, check, send, and track lifecycle emails so customer outreach stays timely, governed, and tied to customer state.

file.description: JSON object loaded from a local file path.

json.description: Inline JSON object supplied through config or runtime overrides.

mock.description: Default synthetic inputs bundled with the blueprint.

required_inputs.description: Retention, conversion, onboarding, or winback objective.
required_inputs.name: campaign_goal

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific outputs.

human.description: Sparse human collaboration notices, input requests, and responses.

input_skills.description: Connector-backed or reusable skill-backed input sources.

inputs.description: Resolved runtime inputs and adapter provenance.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and explicit log artifacts.

output_skills.description: Optional fan-out destinations after local run-store writes.

outputs.description: Primary result and final user-facing artifact.

resources.description: Blueprint-scoped CPU, GPU, memory, and LLM token usage samples.

streams.description: Named data or event streams exposed by the blueprint.

metadata.llm_agent_role: Campaign planner, copywriter, policy checker, delivery executor, inbox responder.
metadata.name: Lifecycle Email Growth Assistant
metadata.output: Prepared emails, sent-event logs, reply handling events, and campaign summaries.

final_artifact.description: The durable user-facing artifact should summarize the result, recommendation, confidence, evidence, next steps, and source references.

output_contract.stdout: single JSON object, event envelope, or bundle path

metadata.problem_solved: Customer outreach changes as replies, segments, policies, and delivery state evolve; static templates miss timing, context, and governance.

quick_test.description: Use generated quick-test bundles when available; fixed blueprints use local dry-run/mock provider environment variables and deterministic sample inputs.

metadata.simulation_type: Lifecycle campaign loop with inbox and delivery state.

standard.execution_model: load_metadata -> resolve_config -> load_inputs -> start_run_store -> observe_simulation_state -> call_llm_agent -> evaluate_workflow_state -> route_by_context -> request_human_input -> apply_decision_to_simulation -> emit_events -> write_final_artifact -> fan_out_output_skills

metadata.target_user: Growth, lifecycle marketing, and customer success teams.

web_ui.description: Shared blueprint support dashboard rendered from local run-store events and artifacts.

name: Lifecycle Email Growth Assistant

workers.role: Resolve mock, JSON, file, or env_json inputs

customer.name: Ava Martinez
customer.profile: Parent of two children who has already created and downloaded multiple stories. Uses Bibblio for confidence-building moments and family keepsakes.

ingress.goal: Turn a satisfied parent into an advocate who shares Bibblio with another parent.
ingress.objective: Turn a satisfied parent into an advocate who shares Bibblio with another parent.
ingress.rationale: Email Marketing Lead Agent generated an outreach plan based on recent activity, audience segment, and offer fit.

recent_activities.summary: Shared referral link from profile after downloading a completed story.
Low remaining credits after creating 2 stories this month.
Completed book about first-day-of-school courage and downloaded PDF.

ingress.why_now: Parents are most likely to share right after seeing a story they are proud of.

customer.name: Mr. Davis
customer.profile: 2nd grade teacher using Bibblio to create personalized stories for his classroom to encourage reading. Needs bulk creation or classroom-oriented stories.

ingress.goal: Get the teacher to create a second story for the class.
ingress.objective: Encourage the teacher to print more stories or create a series for the class.
ingress.rationale: Email Marketing Lead Agent generated an outreach plan based on recent activity, audience segment, and offer fit.

recent_activities.summary: Created a classroom teamwork story for his 2nd grade class.
Downloaded PDF of the classroom story to print for his students.

ingress.why_now: The teacher just downloaded a story, so engagement is high. Great time to upsell or encourage more creation.

workers.role: Write result and final artifact to the local run store

primary.role: Campaign planner, copywriter, policy checker, delivery executor, inbox responder.

steps.goal: Resolve the selected input adapter and record input provenance.
steps.label: Load Inputs

steps.goal: Customer outreach changes as replies, segments, policies, and delivery state evolve; static templates miss timing, context, and governance.
steps.label: Run Workflow

steps.goal: Persist result.json, final_artifact.json, events, logs, and optional output-skill fan-out records.
steps.label: Write Final Artifact
